items.title: How a fake presidential council ended up with a budget of almost $1m in Nigeria
items.dek: The government says it was set up with a forged letter of appointment but others say there is more to it.
items.body: The government says it was set up with a forged letter of appointment but others say there is more to it.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Meta pulls new AI image feature after days of backlash
items.dek: Meta's release this week of an AI feature that let people alter Instagram content drew swift blowback.
items.body: Meta's release this week of an AI feature that let people alter Instagram content drew swift blowback.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: 'Devastating' evidence against Charlie Kirk murder suspect laid out in court
items.dek: Prosecutors build a vivid picture of the suspect's movements as they seek to try the 23-year-old.
items.body: Prosecutors build a vivid picture of the suspect's movements as they seek to try the 23-year-old.
items.author: IriLine Desk
